meta.title: Daimon DAO
meta.description: Official Daimon (DMN) dApp: 1:1 migration, vote-escrow staking and on-chain governance on BNB Chain.

banner.testnet: Test environment — BSC Testnet · tokens and data have no real value

paused.message: ⚠ The contract is temporarily paused for emergency: transfers and actions are suspended until the guardian lifts the pause.

connect.copyTitle: Click to copy the full address
connect.injectedHint: MetaMask and Trust Wallet use the browser wallet.

footer.tagline: Daimon DAO — no owner, no mint, supply floor at 21B. Verify everything on-chain.

tx.signing: ✍️ Waiting for signature in the wallet…
tx.switchCanceled: Network switch canceled: no transaction was sent.
tx.switchFailed: Could not switch to {chain} in the wallet.
tx.switchAndRetry: Switch to {chain} in the wallet and try again.

guard.unexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Details in the console.

errorPage.title: Something went wrong
errorPage.message: An unexpected error occurred in the interface. Your on-chain funds are not affected by display errors.

buy.testnetTitle: Available at mainnet launch: PancakeSwap does not offer a swap interface for the testnet.
buy.mainnetTitle: Opens on PancakeSwap — always verify that the token address matches the one shown here.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: All data is read in real time from the contracts on BNB Chain
dashboard.floorPromise: Once the floor is reached, 100% of revenue will go to stakers
dashboard.connectForStaking: Connect your wallet to see positions and rewards.

governance.title: Governance
governance.subtitle: Decisions go through an on-chain vote and a public 7-day timelock.
governance.created: ✔ Proposal created and confirmed on-chain: it is the first in the list below.
governance.connectToVote: Connect your wallet to vote on or execute proposals.
governance.yourVp: Your voting power on this proposal:
governance.vpTooltip: Voting power is snapshotted when the proposal is created to prevent manipulation: later stakes do not count.
governance.cantVote: You cannot vote on this proposal: your wallet had no voting power when it was created. Only wallets that already had tokens staked before the proposal can vote on it (anti-manipulation protection).
governance.needVpTooltip: Requires voting power at the proposal snapshot
governance.thresholdInfo: Proposing requires at least {threshold} voting power.

migration.title: 1:1 Migration
migration.subtitle: Convert your old Daimon into new DMN, one to one. Old tokens go to the DAO treasury.
migration.closed: The migration window closed on {date}. Migrating from this page is no longer possible: contact the DAO community for available options.
migration.treasuryWarning: ⚠ The connected wallet is the DAO treasury, i.e. the destination of the old tokens: it cannot migrate itself (the contract would reject the operation). Connect a different wallet to try the migration.
migration.detected: Old Daimon detected in the wallet:
migration.connectPrompt: Connect your wallet to detect your old Daimon.
migration.insufficient: The amount exceeds the old Daimon available{balance}: reduce it to proceed.

staking.title: Staking
staking.subtitle: Lock DMN to earn voting power and BNB rewards. The longer the lock, the more weight you get.
staking.insufficientMsg: The amount exceeds the available balance{balance}: reduce it to proceed.
staking.connectPositions: Connect your wallet to see positions and rewards.
staking.scanNote: Note: showing the first {n} global positions.
staking.connectRewards: Connect your wallet to see rewards.
staking.noRewards: No rewards to claim at the moment

errors.LockStillActive: The lock is still active: you can withdraw your tokens only after the unlock date.
errors.AlreadyWithdrawn: This position has already been withdrawn.
errors.NotLockOwner: This position belongs to another wallet.
errors.InvalidLockOption: The selected lock option is not available.
errors.ZeroAmount: The amount must be greater than zero.
errors.NotGovernance: Action reserved to the DAO governance.
errors.VotingClosed: Voting is not open at the moment.
errors.AlreadyVoted: You have already voted on this proposal.
errors.InsufficientVotingPower: You have no voting power at this proposal's snapshot. Voting power is snapshotted when the proposal is created.
errors.ProposalNotSucceeded: The proposal was not approved (or has not concluded yet).
errors.ProposalNotQueued: The proposal must first be queued in the timelock.
errors.AlreadyExecuted: The proposal has already been executed.
errors.TooEarly: The timelock period has not elapsed yet.
errors.OperationNotReady: The operation is not ready for execution.
errors.OperationAlreadyExecuted: The operation has already been executed.
errors.DelayTooShort: The specified delay is below the minimum allowed.
errors.ExecutionFailed: The proposal execution failed in the target contract.
errors.AmountMismatch: The contract detected a mismatch in the amounts. Try again or contact support — your funds have not been touched.
errors.OnlyGovernance: Action reserved to the DAO governance.
errors.AlreadySwept: The residual tokens have already been recovered by the DAO.
errors.ContractIsPaused: The contract is temporarily paused for emergency.
errors.GuardianExpired: The guardian role has expired: the pause can no longer be activated.
errors.TransferAmountExceedsMaxTx: The amount exceeds the per-transaction limit.
errors.BelowMinSupply: The operation would bring the supply below the 21B floor.
errors.FeeTooHigh: The proposed fees exceed the 10% cap.
errors.AccessControlUnauthorizedAccount: The connected wallet does not have permission for this action.
errors.contractRefused: The transaction was rejected by the contract. No funds were moved.
errors.unexpected: Unexpected error while sending the transaction.
